title: JSON Schema validator → MCP envelope error_code mapping
description: Canonical mapping that both Amazon SP MCP and Amazon Ads MCP servers MUST honor when their pre-flight schema-validation middleware rejects a tool call. Each entry binds a jsonschema validator name (the `validator` attribute on `jsonschema.ValidationError`) to the v1 envelope `error_code` string and the canonical hint shown to agents. Servers can append per-tool hints; they MUST NOT change the error_code for a given validator. The conformance test in openbridge-mcp/tests/conformance/ enforces parity by sending the same bad-input shape to both servers and asserting they emit matching codes.

type.hint: Send a value of the schema-declared type for {path}.

maximum.hint: Use a value at most {limit} for {path}.

minimum.hint: Use a value at least {limit} for {path}.

pattern.summary_template: Field {path} does not match required pattern.
pattern.hint: Adjust {path} to match the schema pattern.

additionalProperties.hint: Remove unknown key {extra} or check schema for typos.

oneOf.hint: Inspect schema branches for {path} and pick exactly one.

anyOf.hint: Inspect schema branches for {path} and provide a matching shape.

allOf.hint: Field {path} must satisfy every allOf branch simultaneously.

uniqueItems.summary_template: Array {path} has duplicate items where uniqueItems=true.

const.summary_template: Field {path} must equal the schema-declared constant.

multipleOf.summary_template: Field {path} must be a multiple of the declared base.
multipleOf.hint: Provide a multiple of the schema-declared base for {path}.

fallback.hint: Inspect the schema for {path} and adjust the value.

domain_validators._note: Codes emitted by domain validators (closed-enum checks against runtime caches like identity lists) that share the SCHEMA_* envelope shape but do not correspond to a jsonschema validator name. These codes still carry error_kind=mcp_input_validation; agents can branch on them for domain-specific recovery flows.

SCHEMA_IDENTITY_NOT_FOUND.summary_template: Identity '{identity_id}' is not in the available identity list.
SCHEMA_IDENTITY_NOT_FOUND.hint: Call list_identities to see available identities; details.hints carries closest-match suggestions.

compliance_note: The path token is a JSON Pointer rendering of jsonschema.ValidationError.absolute_path. When the error originates from a combinator (oneOf/anyOf/allOf), the path is the combinator's parent path, not a sub-branch. Servers MAY include sub-branch reasons in `_meta.schema_branches` but MUST keep the top-level error_code stable.
